content:
version: "3"
services:
  dozzle:
    container_name: dozzle
    image: amir20/dozzle:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      # Dozzle се нуждае от достъп до Docker сокета, за да чете логовете
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
    ports:
      # Използваме 8888, защото Glance вече е заел 8080
      - 8888:8080
    environment:
      # Опционално: Заглавие на страницата
      - DOZZLE_TITLE=Home Server Logs
      # Опционално: Ако искаш да виждаш само контейнери, които работят
      - DOZZLE_FILTER=status=running
      # Ако решиш да го изкараш публично, може да сложиш потребител и парола:
      # - DOZZLE_USERNAME=admin
      # - DOZZLE_PASSWORD=tvoiata_parola

version: '3'
services:
  filebrowser:
    image: filebrowser/filebrowser
    container_name: filebrowser
    user: 0:0
    ports:
      - 8083:80
    volumes:
      - /:/srv
      - ./filebrowser.db:/database/filebrowser.db
    command: --port 80 --address 0.0.0.0 --database /database/filebrowser.db
    restart: unless-stopped
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true

services:
  glance:
    container_name: glance
    image: glanceapp/glance
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - ./config:/app/config
      - ./assets:/app/assets
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
    ports:
      - 8080:8080
    env_file: .env
    dns:
      - 8.8.8.8
      - 1.1.1.1

services:
  zurg:
    image: ghcr.io/debridmediamanager/zurg-testing:latest
    container_name: zurg
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 9999:9999
    volumes:
      - ~/zurg/config:/app/config

services:
  zurg:
    image: ghcr.io/debridmediamanager/zurg-testing:latest
    container_name: zurg
    restart: always  # Променихме на always, за да е като Glance
    ports:
      - 9999:9999
    volumes:
      - ./config.yml:/app/config.yml
      - zurg_data:/app/data
    # ТОВА Е НОВОТО: Zurg сам проверява дали работи
    healthcheck:
      test: curl -f http://localhost:9999/dav/ || exit 1
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 10s

#  rdtclient:
#    image: rogerfar/rdt-client:latest
#    container_name: rdtclient
#    volumes:
#      - ./rdtclient_config:/data/db
#      - /mnt/zurg:/data/downloads  # Трикът: Казваме му, че Zurg е папката за сваляне
#    ports:
#      - 6500:6500
#    environment:
#      - PUID=1000
#      - PGID=1000
#      - TZ=Europe/Sofia
#    restart: always

  rclone:
    image: rclone/rclone:latest
    container_name: rclone
    restart: always
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
    devices:
      - /dev/fuse:/dev/fuse
    cap_add:
      - SYS_ADMIN
    security_opt:
      - apparmor:unconfined
    command: "mount zurg: /data/mount --vfs-cache-mode full --allow-other --dir-cache-time 10s --vfs-read-chunk-size 32M --allow-non-empty"
    volumes:
      - ./rclone.conf:/config/rclone/rclone.conf
      - /mnt/zurg:/data/mount:rshared
    # ТОВА Е НОВОТО: Rclone чака Zurg да стане "healthy"
    depends_on:
      zurg:
        condition: service_healthy

  plex:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/plex:latest
    container_name: plex
    network_mode: host
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - VERSION=docker
    volumes:
      - ./plex_config:/config
      - /mnt/zurg:/media
    restart: always
    depends_on:
      - rclone
  adguard:
      image: adguard/adguardhome
      container_name: adguard
      restart: unless-stopped
      ports:
        - "53:53/tcp"
        - "53:53/udp"
        - "3000:3000/tcp" # За първоначална настройка
        - "8081:80/tcp"   # За уеб интерфейса (слагаме го на 8080, за да не се бие с други)
      volumes:
        - ./adguard_work:/opt/adguardhome/work
        - ./adguard_conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf
  radarr:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/radarr:latest
    container_name: radarr
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/Sofia
    volumes:
      - ./radarr_config:/config
      - /mnt/zurg:/movies  # Важно: Radarr трябва да вижда Zurg диска
      - ./downloads:/downloads # Папка за временни файлове (symlinks)
    ports:
      - 7878:7878
    restart: unless-stopped

  prowlarr:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/prowlarr:latest
    container_name: prowlarr
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/Sofia
    volumes:
      - ./prowlarr_config:/config
    ports:
      - 9696:9696
    restart: unless-stopped

  overseerr:
    image: sctx/overseerr:latest
    container_name: overseerr
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/Sofia
    volumes:
      - ./overseerr_config:/app/config
    ports:
      - 5055:5055
    restart: unless-stopped

  tailscale:
    container_name: tailscale
    image: tailscale/tailscale:latest
    network_mode: host       # Важно: Позволява директен достъп до мрежата на сървъра
    privileged: true         # Задължително за VPN тунели
    volumes:
      - ./tailscale_config:/var/lib/tailscale # Тук се пази "самоличността" на машината
      - /dev/net/tun:/dev/net/tun             # Достъп до тунелния драйвер на Linux
    environment:
      - TS_STATE_DIR=/var/lib/tailscale
      - TS_EXTRA_ARGS=--advertise-exit-node   # Активира функцията за Exit Node
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  zurg_data:

version: '3.8'

services:
  zurg:
    image: ghcr.io/debridmediamanager/zurg-testing:latest
    container_name: zurg
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 9999:9999
    volumes:
      - ./config.yml:/app/config.yml
      - zurg_data:/app/data

  rclone:
    image: rclone/rclone:latest
    container_name: rclone
    restart: unless-stopped
    devices:
      - /dev/fuse:/dev/fuse
    cap_add:
      - SYS_ADMIN
    security_opt:
      - apparmor:unconfined
    command: "mount zurg: /data/mount --vfs-cache-mode full --allow-other --dir-cache-time 10s --vfs-read-chunk-size 32M"
    volumes:
      - ./rclone.conf:/config/rclone/rclone.conf
      - /mnt/zurg:/data/mount:rshared  # Това създава папка /mnt/zurg на твоя компютър
    depends_on:
      - zurg

  plex:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/plex:latest
    container_name: plex
    network_mode: host
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - VERSION=docker
    volumes:
      - ./plex_config:/config
      - /mnt/zurg:/media/zurg  # Plex чете от тук
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - rclone
  adguard:
      image: adguard/adguardhome
      container_name: adguard
      restart: unless-stopped
      ports:
        - "53:53/tcp"  # DNS (Основният порт)
        - "53:53/udp"  # DNS (UDP е задължителен)
        - "3000:3000/tcp" # Setup Port
        - "8083:80/tcp"   # Admin Web Interface (вътре е 80, ние го виждаме на 8083)
      volumes:
        - ~/server/config/adguard/work:/opt/adguardhome/work
        - ~/server/config/adguard/conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf



volumes:
  zurg_data:

version: '3'
services: 
  nocodb: 
    image: nocodb/nocodb:latest
    ports: 
      - "8091:8080"
    restart: always
    environment: 
      # Тук указваме на NocoDB къде е базата
      NC_DB: "pg://postgres:5432?u=postgres&p=password&d=gymbox" 
    depends_on: 
      - postgres
    volumes: 
      - nc_data:/usr/app/data

  arbitrage-engine:
    build: ./workspace/book_arbitrage  # Path to the folder we created above
    container_name: arbitrage_engine
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=postgres
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=password
      - POSTGRES_DB=gymbox
      - POSTGRES_HOST=postgres  # This works because they are in the same network
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    restart: "no"  # We run it once manually or schedule it, don't restart constantly

  postgres: 
    # Използваме версия 16, за да избегнем проблемите с 'latest'
    image: postgres:16
    restart: always
    environment: 
      POSTGRES_DB: gymbox
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
    volumes: 
      - pg_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

volumes:
  nc_data:
  pg_data:

version: '3.3'
services:
  jelu:
    image: wabayang/jelu:latest
    container_name: jelu
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 11111:11111
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/Sofia
      # If using an ARM-based server (like a Raspberry Pi), uncomment the line below:
      # - JELU_METADATA_CALIBRE_PATH=/usr/bin/fetch-ebook-metadata
    volumes:
      - ./config:/config
      - ./database:/database
      - ./files/images:/files/images
      - ./files/imports:/files/imports
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro

services:
  vaultwarden:
    image: vaultwarden/server:latest
    container_name: vaultwarden
    restart: always
    environment:
      - WEBSOCKET_ENABLED=true
      - SIGNUPS_ALLOWED=false  # Ще го сменим на false, след като направиш акаунт
      - DOMAIN=https://vaultwarden.zdravko-home.org
    volumes:
      - ./vw-data:/data
    ports:
      - 8085:80 # 8085 към външния свят (както е в NPM), 80 вътре в контейнера

services:
  docmost:
    image: docmost/docmost:latest
    container_name: docmost
    depends_on:
      - docmost_db
      - docmost_redis
    environment:
      - APP_URL=http://192.168.0.160:8090
      - APP_SECRET=change_this_to_a_long_random_string
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://docmost:your_password@docmost_db:5432/docmost?schema=public
      - REDIS_URL=redis://docmost_redis:6379
    volumes:
      - ./data:/app/data/storage
    ports:
      - "8092:3000"
    restart: unless-stopped

  docmost_db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: docmost_db
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=docmost
      - POSTGRES_USER=docmost
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=your_password
    volumes:
      - ./db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    restart: unless-stopped

  docmost_redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: docmost_redis
    restart: unless-stopped

version: '3.8'
services:
  app:
    image: 'jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:latest'
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '80:80'      # Публичен HTTP порт (Вход за сайтовете ти)
      - '81:81'      # Админ панел на NPM
      - '443:443'    # HTTPS порт
    volumes:
      - ./data:/data
      - ./letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt
